posts.author: johnche (Edward Guevara)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Monday team
I have recently started using monday and am trying to integrate with an application published on a server. What I need is that you can provide me with information (or an example) on how to load information from a database hosted on a web server to a Monday dashboard. The web application is developed with Node Js.
